title: Redrob JD Schema
description: Schema for a Job Description file used by the Redrob AI Candidate Ranker. Upload a JSON file following this schema to rank candidates against any custom role.

title.description: Full job title shown in the UI. Example: 'Senior AI Engineer — Founding Team'

company_name.description: Hiring company name. Optional — shown in UI only.

required_skills.description: Keywords the system will search for in career descriptions AND skills. These are the core domain signals. Example: ['python', 'pytorch', 'faiss', 'recommendation system']

positive_title_tokens.description: Job title keywords that indicate the candidate IS the right type of person. Example: ['ml engineer', 'data scientist', 'search engineer']

hard_negative_title_tokens.description: Job title keywords that DISQUALIFY a candidate regardless of skills. Example: ['marketing', 'sales', 'frontend', 'devops']. Candidates matching these are capped at score 0.15.

preferred_locations.description: City names that get the highest location score. Example: ['pune', 'noida']. Case-insensitive.

acceptable_locations.description: City names that are acceptable (tier-2 preference). Example: ['bangalore', 'delhi', 'mumbai', 'hyderabad']

min.description: Minimum years (candidates below this are penalized)

max.description: Maximum years (candidates above this get slightly lower score)

ideal_min.description: Optional: ideal lower bound. Defaults to min.

ideal_max.description: Optional: ideal upper bound. Defaults to max.

salary_range_inr_lpa.description: Expected salary budget range in INR Lakhs Per Annum. Candidates outside this range receive a multiplier penalty.

min.description: Minimum budget. Candidates asking less are fine.

max.description: Maximum budget. Candidates asking more are penalized.

avoid_consulting_only.description: If true, candidates whose ENTIRE career is at consulting firms (TCS, Infosys, Wipro etc.) receive a penalty. Default: true.

cv_specialty_penalty_keywords.description: Career description keywords indicating a specialist in an UNWANTED domain. Candidates whose career descriptions ONLY contain these keywords (without any overlap with required_skills) receive a penalty. Example: ['computer vision only', 'speech recognition', 'robotics']. Leave empty to disable.
